scripts.stage:pages: rm -rf .pages/lightweaver && mkdir -p .pages/lightweaver && cp -R dist/. .pages/lightweaver/ && node scripts/generate-studio-build-graph.mjs .pages/lightweaver
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && npm run stage:pages && npm run verify:pages && wrangler pages deploy .pages/lightweaver --project-name lightweaver --branch main
scripts.pages:project: wrangler pages project create lightweaver --production-branch main
scripts.pi:start: npm run build && npm run serve:pi
scripts.launch:source: npm run test:core:source && npm run test:prod-deploy && npm run test:build-graph && npm run test:show && npm run test:screen-recovery && npm run test:production && npm run test:unit && npm run test:release-ui && node scripts/ensure-rollup-native.mjs && npm run build && npm run stage:pages && npm run verify:pages
scripts.launch:check: npm run launch:source && npm run firmware:check-bin
scripts.test:core:source: npm run test:installer-core && node --test src/lib/firmwareRelease.test.js && node scripts/run-core-source-tests.mjs
